display_information.name: Block Kit Adventure
display_information.description: Learn Block Kit features by playing a choose-your-own-adventure game
display_information.long_description:
Block Kit Adventure is a choose-your-own-adventure game that doubles as a working reference for Slack's Block Kit framework. Play through "The Lost Deploy" — a developer-themed story about a Friday afternoon production incident — and see how each Block Kit component is used in context.

The app demonstrates five Block Kit block types in action:
• Header blocks for scene titles
• Section blocks with mrkdwn formatting for narrative text
• Actions blocks with styled buttons (primary and danger) for player choices
• Context blocks for progress indicators
• Divider blocks for visual separation

It also covers common Slack platform patterns: global shortcuts, App Home tabs with views.publish, in-place message updates with chat.update, and DM-based interactions.

13 scenes, 6 endings, and branching paths — explore different outcomes to see every component in use.

How to play:
• Use the "Start Adventure" global shortcut from Slack's search bar
• Or open the app's Home tab and click "Start Adventure"

The source code is designed to be read alongside the app. Each Block Kit pattern maps directly to a function you can reference in your own projects.

app_directory._comment: Required for Slack Marketplace listing. See https://docs.slack.dev/reference/app-manifest#app_directory
